title: OccupancyStatus
description: An indicator of the current passenger load level of a vehicle, such as empty, many seats available, or full.

occupancyLevel.description: Occupancy level (EMPTY, MANY_SEATS_AVAILABLE, FEW_SEATS_AVAILABLE, STANDING_ROOM_ONLY, FULL, NOT_ACCEPTING_PASSENGERS)

availableSeats.description: Estimated number of seats currently available

totalSeats.description: Total seating capacity of the vehicle

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the state was last updated
